stemHtml: What is the correct way of reading back the following clearance? "G-ABCD, WHEN AIRBORNE, TURN RIGHT, LEAVE CONTROL ZONE VIA ROUTE ECHO."

options.a: RIGHT TURN VIA ROUTE ECHO, G-ABCD.
options.b: WHEN AIRBORNE RIGHT TURN, ROUTE ECHO, G-CD.
options.d: TURNING RIGHT, LEAVING CONTROL ZONE VIA ROUTE ECHO, G-CD.
